nasb.text: Then Moses said to Aaron, “What did this people do to you, that you have brought such great sin upon them?”

esv.text: And Moses said to Aaron, “What did this people do to you that you have brought such a great sin upon them?”

cnv.text: 摩西對亞倫說：“這人民向你作了甚麼，你竟使他們陷在大罪裡呢？”

ccb.text: 摩西对亚伦说：“这些百姓对你做了什么？你竟使他们陷入大罪中！”
